changes: Revert steering changes at high speed until a better model is implemented.
serverChanges: Added server support for race-preparation withdrawal, allowing a player to skip the current prep round without leaving the room.
Race preparation now starts only with ready participants and cancels clearly when there are not enough active racers after loadout decisions.
Room numbering now compacts player and bot slots after joins/leaves so assignments remain contiguous and predictable.
Server release revision updated for protocol compatibility alignment with the latest client.
